'''thatara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yodeller|yodeller]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-t-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yodeller|yodeller]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thatara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thætæræth|thætæræth]] || [[word:thætæræj|thætæræj]] || [[word:thætæræsh|thætæræsh]] || [[word:thætæræ|thætæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatatarath|thatatarath]] || [[word:thatataraj|thatataraj]] || [[word:thatatarash|thatatarash]] || [[word:thatatara|thatatara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatarath|thatarath]] || [[word:thataraj|thataraj]] || [[word:thatarash|thatarash]] || [[word:thatara|thatara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatafrath|thatafrath]] || [[word:thatafraj|thatafraj]] || [[word:thatafrash|thatafrash]] || [[word:thatafraf|thatafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thataratha|thataratha]] || [[word:thataraja|thataraja]] || [[word:thatarasha|thatarasha]] || [[word:thataraka|thataraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thatarath|thatarath]] || [[word:thataraj|thataraj]] || [[word:thatarash|thatarash]] || [[word:thatara|thatara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thatarathal|thatarathal]] || [[word:thatarajal|thatarajal]] || [[word:thatarashal|thatarashal]] || [[word:thatarakal|thatarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thatarathatha|thatarathatha]] || [[word:thatarajaja|thatarajaja]] || [[word:thatarashasha|thatarashasha]] || [[word:thataraka|thataraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thatarathan|thatarathan]] || [[word:thatarajan|thatarajan]] || [[word:thatarashan|thatarashan]] || [[word:thatarakan|thatarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thatarathaoro|thatarathaoro]] || [[word:thatarajaoro|thatarajaoro]] || [[word:thatarashaoro|thatarashaoro]] || [[word:thatarakaoro|thatarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
